stemHtml: You are flying an aircraft with supercritical wings high in the troposphere, when you are instructed to climb. You are maintaining a low Mach number due to an ATC speed restriction when you commence the climb. What is likely to happen?

options.a: Low speed buffet at MCRIT due to temperature increase
options.b: High speed buffet at MCRIT due to compressibility
options.c: Low speed buffet at VS1 due to compressibility
options.d: High speed buffet at VS1 due to temperature increase
